case_title: POSTCARD CAPITAL II, LLC, VS. CARA CONNOR ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-12-2016 CONTINUED TO DEC-14-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF(S) TO FILE JUDGMENT FOLLOWING ORDER GRANTING ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-14-2016 CONTINUED TO FEB-15-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60389234) FILED BY PLAINTIFF POSTCARD CAPITAL II, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF POSTCARD CAPITAL II, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CONNOR, CARA DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-12-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-11-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-19-2016

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-28-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE JUDGMENT FOLLOWING ORDER GRANTING ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. THE FEB-15-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-28-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-28-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF ANDREW R CATTERALL IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION SEEKING ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60389234) FILED BY PLAINTIFF POSTCARD CAPITAL II, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: 1) DEFENDANT IS NOT AN ORIGINAL OCCUPANT OF DOLORES STREET; 2) PLAINTIFF AND/OR HIS PREDECESSORS IN INTEREST TIMELY SERVED DEFENDANT WITH A NOTICE INFORMING HER THAT THE LANDLORD CAN IMPOSE A RENT INCREASE WITHOUT LIMITATION WHEN THE LAST ORIGINAL TENANT VACATES THE UNIT; (SEE SCANNED DECLARATORY JUDGMENT FOR FULL DETAILS)

EX PARTE APPLICATION SEEKING ENTRY OF STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR ENTRY OF DECLARATORY JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 59185225) FILED BY PLAINTIFF POSTCARD CAPITAL II, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
ORDER AND STIPULATION FOR ENRTY OF DECLARATORY JUDGMENT
